subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! A brief reply is being written; pray excuse me. Both dreams indicate [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان جواب مختصر مرقوم میگردد معذور دارید هر دو رویا دلیل بر
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @interpretation of dreams and visions, @rejection, opposition and persecution
